name: Ziang (Jay) Zhang
about: I build production-grade AI and industrial digitalization systems — from IT/OT integration platforms on factory floors to RAG-powered enterprise AI applications. My work sits at the intersection of software engineering, machine learning, and real-world deployment.

education.note: Minor in Engineering Business · Certificate in AI

experience.title: GenAI Consultant (Practicum)
bullets: Built a RAG HR assistant enabling employees to query internal policies via natural language.
Designed an AI-powered policy authoring platform automating policy generation with corporate standards.
Presented GenAI solutions to business stakeholders.

experience.title: Technical Consultant – Factory Automation & Digitalization
bullets: Delivered IT/OT integration solutions for 30+ manufacturing and agricultural facilities.
Built a high-frequency edge data acquisition platform for Great Wall Motors using HTTP, Redis, and RabbitMQ.
Built energy management apps for Swire Coca-Cola integrating PLC and utility meter data.

experience.title: Founder & Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Built a SaaS platform for international driver's license translation, processing 500+ orders.
Developed full stack: frontend, backend APIs, OCR validation, PDF generation, and payments.
Reduced manual document preparation time by 95% through full workflow automation.
